title: ta'anah #8385
definition:
1) occasion, time of heat or oestrous or copulation, sexual drive (of animal)
 2) occasion, opportunity (for a quarrel)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) occasion, time of heat or oestrous or copulation, sexual drive (of animal)
 2) occasion, opportunity (for a quarrel)

    NASB:  occasion or time of copulation
